characters.name: Angels
characters.description: AngelsA collection of various angelsNameAngels of HeavenLocationHeavenLeaderSeraMembersSeraphimArchangelsExorcistsVirtues[1]Dominions[1]CherubsWinners[2][3]StatusActive Angelsare supernatural creatures, consisting of deceasedhumansouls, and native citizens that inhabitHeaven. Angels refer to the entities that are found in Heaven, encompassing beings that are both native species of the realm and humans that were elevated to one at time of death, such asAdam.
